languages.text: "Лорд-капитан ждал армию, но явились лишь вы. Дайте угадаю: сейчас я услышу дурные вести?" {n}Хотя ее слова и звучат как вопрос, в них слышится лишь усталое смирение.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан ждал армию, но явились лишь вы. Дайте угадаю: сейчас я услышу дурные вести?" {n}Хотя ее слова и звучат как вопрос, в них слышится лишь усталое смирение.{/n}

languages.text: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан ждал армию, но явились лишь вы. Дайте угадаю: сейчас я услышу дурные вести?" {n}Хотя ее слова и звучат как вопрос, в них слышится лишь усталое смирение.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}
"The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}
"The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人等的是一整支军队，结果只来了你一个人。让我猜猜，接下来我是不是要听到坏消息了？”{n}她的话听着像询问，但语气里只有疲惫的认命。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人等的是一整支军队，结果只来了你一个人。让我猜猜，接下来我是不是要听到坏消息了？”{n}她的话听着像询问，但语气里只有疲惫的认命。{/n}

languages.text: « Le seigneur-capitaine attendait une armée, mais je constate que vous êtes {mf|seul|seule}. Laissez-moi deviner : vous avez une mauvaise nouvelle à m'annoncer ? » {n}Si ses propos s'apparentent à une question, vous ne décelez dans sa voix qu'une résignation désabusée.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Le seigneur-capitaine attendait une armée, mais je constate que vous êtes {mf|seul|seule}. Laissez-moi deviner : vous avez une mauvaise nouvelle à m'annoncer ? » {n}Si ses propos s'apparentent à une question, vous ne décelez dans sa voix qu'une résignation désabusée.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan bir ordu bekliyordu. Burada senden başka kimseyi göremiyorum. Tahmin edeyim... Haberler kötü, değil mi?" {n}Soru soruyormuş gibi görünse de yüreği, yorgun bir kabullenmişlikle dolu.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan bir ordu bekliyordu. Burada senden başka kimseyi göremiyorum. Tahmin edeyim... Haberler kötü, değil mi?" {n}Soru soruyormuş gibi görünse de yüreği, yorgun bir kabullenmişlikle dolu.{/n}

languages.text: «El Lord Capitán esperaba un ejército, pero solo ha llegado usted. Deje que adivine: ¿voy a oír malas noticias?». {n}Aunque ha formulado una pregunta, solo hay una resignación cansada tras ellas.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «El Lord Capitán esperaba un ejército, pero solo ha llegado usted. Deje que adivine: ¿voy a oír malas noticias?». {n}Aunque ha formulado una pregunta, solo hay una resignación cansada tras ellas.{/n}

languages.text: "Der Lord Captain hat eine Armee erwartet, aber nur Ihr seid gekommen. Lasst mich raten: Gleich überbringt Ihr mir schlechte Neuigkeiten?" {n}Obwohl ihre Worte wie eine Frage klingen, erkennst nichts als müde Resignation in ihnen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Der Lord Captain hat eine Armee erwartet, aber nur Ihr seid gekommen. Lasst mich raten: Gleich überbringt Ihr mir schlechte Neuigkeiten?" {n}Obwohl ihre Worte wie eine Frage klingen, erkennst nichts als müde Resignation in ihnen.{/n}

languages.text: 「大将は軍勢を待っていたが、君しか到着しなかった。推測するが、悪い知らせを聞くことになるだろう？」{n}彼女の言葉は問いかけのように聞こえるが、その中にはただ疲れ切った諦めしかない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain was expecting an army, but only you arrived. Let me guess: I am about to hear some bad news?" {n}Though her words sound like a question, there is only weary resignation in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「大将は軍勢を待っていたが、君しか到着しなかった。推測するが、悪い知らせを聞くことになるだろう？」{n}彼女の言葉は問いかけのように聞こえるが、その中にはただ疲れ切った諦めしかない。{/n}
